en.extract:
The violet-breasted sunbird (Cinnyris chalcomelas) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae (sunbirds). It is found in Kenya and Somalia.
It is sometimes regarded as the same species as the Pemba sunbird.

The '''violet-breasted sunbird''' ('''''Cinnyris chalcomelas''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Nectariniidae]] (sunbirds). It is found in [[Kenya]] and [[Somalia]].

It is sometimes regarded as the same species as the [[Pemba sunbird]].<ref name=BirdsofEastAfrica>{{cite book |last1=Stevenson |first1=Terry |last2=Fanshawe |first2=John |date=2002  |title=Birds of East Africa: Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda, Rwanda, Burundi |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=jcN1OCKC-bQC&pg=PA454 |location=London |publisher=[[T. & A. D. Poyser]] |page=454 |isbn=0-85661-079-8 |lccn=00-110863}}</ref>
